Headline: #52 Kedzie/California Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/Ogden
ShortDescription: #52 Kedzie/California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Kedzie, Ogden, Central Park, Cermak & Kedzie due to street blockage nr Kedzie/Ogden.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How doe this affect my trip?

#52 Kedzie/California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Kedzie, Ogden, Central Park, Cermak, then resume their normal route on Kedzie.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Kedzie/Ogden.
